name: What does good AI visibility actually look like?

mainEntity.name: What does good AI visibility actually look like?

acceptedAnswer.text: A good result is when AI systems describe your brand accurately, cite the right page, and distinguish you correctly from competitors. That matters because AI-generated answers often shape first impressions before a user ever reaches your site.
acceptedAnswer.description: Good AI visibility means accurate mentions, correct summaries, and the right pages being cited.

description: Good AI visibility means accurate mentions, correct summaries, and the right pages being cited.
